use_cases: Show hierarchical location in website navigation structure
Enable quick navigation to parent pages in e-commerce category trees
Improve user orientation in multi-level documentation sites
Provide clear path indicators in content management systems
ai_summary: A smart breadcrumb navigation component that automatically displays the user's current location in a hierarchical path structure, enabling quick navigation to parent pages. Built with Radix UI primitives for accessibility compliance, featuring responsive design with collapsible separators for mobile screens.
